rationale_short: Tire selection and rim requirements for light motor vehicles per TSD 110.
Tire selection and rim requirements for vehicles with GVWR greater than 4,536 kg per TSD 111.
Vehicle immobilization system requirements to prevent theft.
Hydraulic brake fluid performance specifications per TSD 116.
Air brake system performance requirements for heavy vehicles per TSD 121.
Electronic stability control system requirements per TSD 126.
Stop signal lamp requirements including high-mounted stop lamps.
Light vehicle brake system performance requirements per TSD 135.
Interpretation section defining key terms used throughout the Motor Vehicle Safety Regulations.
Interior head impact protection requirements for occupant compartment surfaces.
Head restraint requirements to protect occupants from whiplash injury.
Seat belt fit and comfort requirements per TSD 208.
Seat belt assembly anchorage strength requirements per TSD 210.
End-of-life vehicles directive restricting hazardous materials and mandating recyclability targets.
Batteries and accumulators directive covering hazardous substance limits and collection requirements.
